creator: marc.vanwoerkom@science-factory.com
text:
It is not clear from a user's perspective what is different
        about these XFree86 series 4.x ports:

	  XFree86-4
	  XFree86-4-clients
	  XFree86-4-documents
	  XFree86-4-libraries
	  XFree86-4-manuals
	  XFree86-aoutlibs
	  XFree86-contrib

        one is a complete tarball, the others are a split of 
        the former (except for the a.out compat port)

        As XFree86 4.x is still rather uncommon, this should
        be made clear without the user having to compare 
        packaging lists or downloading.

Fix: I suggest these changes (or similiar).

cvs diff: Diffing XFree86-4


Regards,
Marc--WlPWZEOmrhujyNQdji2hMEDbZKjYimfpo2JSUHUekQzQMJcA
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"
